title: Crash due to misuse of window functions.
description:
drh added on 2019-02-22 18:44:24:
The following SQL statement causes a crash due to attempt to free memory
that was not obtained from malloc():
SELECT +sum(0)OVER() ORDER BY +sum(0)OVER();
This problem has existed in all prior versions of SQLite that support
window functions, beginning with version 3.25.0 (2018-09-15).
key_bug_features: Misuse of window functions in SQL statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, category TEXT);
SELECT value, SUM(value) OVER (PARTITION BY category) AS category_sum FROM test_table ORDER BY category_sum;
SELECT +SUM(value) OVER () AS total_sum FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
